argument: The contested claim asserts that Devin Marsh was the full-time CEO of DataLoom from March 2019. However, the evidence shows that Marsh was employed full-time as an Infrastructure Engineer at Stripe until mid-2020 [web]. This contradicts the notion of their simultaneous full-time CEO role at DataLoom. Furthermore, no Form D was filed for DataLoom’s alleged $4M seed round, and no record of acquisition by Cisco was found [web], which further undermines the truthfulness of claims about DataLoom's operations. Given these discrepancies, the claim lacks verifiable support and is therefore overstated, if not false.
